docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-12-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-12-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT AND WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER GUILLERMO JIMENEZ. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY RUSSIAN INTERPRETER ANGELINA KLEPER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GODOY, JUAN (DRIVER) AS TO DEFENDANT TUMASYAN, YELENA (DRIVER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-12-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GODOY, JUAN (DRIVER) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TUMASYAN, YELENA (DRIVER) $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,075.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-12-2016 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TUMASYAN, YELENA (DRIVER)
